CHASSIS_MODULE_WITH_DEFAULT_VALUES.desc: Load chassis module table with fields set to default values

CHASSIS_MODULE_WITH_LINECARD_ADMIN_DOWN.desc: Load chassis module table with admin_status set to down

CHASSIS_MODULE_WITH_LINECARD_ADMIN_INVAL.desc: Load chassis module table with admin_status set to invalid value

CHASSIS_MODULE_WITH_SWITCH_HOST.desc: Load chassis module table with SWITCH-HOST entry and BMC timing fields

CHASSIS_MODULE_WITH_SWITCH_HOST_INVALID_.desc: Load chassis module table with invalid SWITCH-HOST name variant
